reason: Check frontend implementation against all relevant frontend guideline areas
Verify wishlist components use accessible buttons, proper props, local styling tokens, and mobile-first structure
Verify wishlist store persistence, selectors, and sync behavior match local-first conventions
Verify new wishlist types, optional values, and row casts are safe and localized
Verify quality gates, forbidden patterns, and user-visible toast/confirm behavior
Verify wishlist_items migration, RLS, soft delete, and row conversion follow Supabase conventions
Check conversion from WishlistItem to Bean and Supabase/local persistence boundaries
